# Chapter 05 - Meta Commentary

[gxxtdtmh]
INTENT: Open on dawn ritual + car-as-animal; set tone for first real test drive.
PLOT: Kicks off the “dawn drive” sequence.
TONE: Quiet predation.
POV: Flynn.

[ntaohgvb]
INTENT: Establish merciful dawn + Flynn trying not to look needy.
CHARACTER: He’s seeking Cage’s attention/approval.
TONE: Soft anticipation.
POV: Flynn.

[xwijdkjh]
INTENT: Cage introduced as already-present, controlling the morning.
PLOT: Sets mentor dynamic at the start of the drive.
CHARACTER: Cage = entitlement + calm danger.
POV: Flynn.

[o1hz0j3k]
INTENT: Re-emphasize hard-off silence as emotional space.

CHARACTER: Fear/excitement surface when guidance disappears.
